textByHash.0414f1da89f2556a73bb41748d43c21d94b07703: I'll need coins to repair that.
textByHash.0d335fc77b7bc12ae1da3bdd79905b80a01d816a: I'm sure you could use my help with many things, human, but I'm very busy.
textByHash.13968a95f946a5cec6113a1beb50ce5143269b65: Oh... Well I suppose I can help then, as long as you make it quick. What did you say you needed?
textByHash.387f8a7ae18d63a678ea8036871d07e8a5e38556: As you wish. You are always welcome to return if you change your mind.
textByHash.3d199e98dfef6f7cf3342cdf8e83fb1fabd20879: You don't have anything I can repair.
textByHash.3fe889ca5f698d428d46b86120b0dcf4f031f85c: Of course. This sort of magic is child's play. Where are the talismans?
textByHash.445db4405824723acb3c77c3e96a5f10904aefb6: Axe? I don't have your axe. Are you sure you gave it to me?
textByHash.4591f338b50b493371e70e78edfae02bbeb20817: No! I have many things to do right now so I can't add that to my list!
textByHash.50d5e4ccf57aadbcf73942170176444cf7ef6aa8: Nilsal. Interested in buying some weapons or armour?
textByHash.5459c44a2e9aa82cc7f29de1d73d47ba1e8c2e9a: Of course. This sort of magic is child's play. Give me a moment...
textByHash.56d77b64599dbb0afc5862aeed9bcae49872f52f: Well, you can't. No repairs are getting done until the whetstone is fixed!
textByHash.6f60c37c369fbc271c2e55c8812db6b145bbd367: Make some room if you want my help!
textByHash.72a59f6f817f56ada3ce77f1f9c2aaf161eaa6f7: A human? Either buy something or get out!
textByHash.787dadfc5bd45d3bce03ec620c9db7e188346575: Of course, and you won't find anything finer than what I offer. I didn't become the official blacksmith to the Royal Family of Varlamore by producing subpar goods.
textByHash.79507baf1d30799b1ef2bf42779b225294226bf5: All done. Take these back to Attala. She'll tell you what to do with them.
textByHash.8134d02bb67c8520f111d6fe43af174ccdffc884: Attala? What's she got to do with you?
textByHash.8ad60eff9cdfb54b50acc85b8b4869255bed6840: Than I cannot. However, I still have plenty of other items that might interest you. Would you like to take a look?
textByHash.8b388e1811546d6affd8cb19b3b5993096632498: Okay, yes, I can repair an axe for you. It won't be quick though as I have a lot of other work to get through first.
textByHash.971d5fcbd6c9299e5a4005c4041260ed9e44c357: Sorry, I don't sell those! Move along!
textByHash.9a3f570dff2f818117baf8028f9b0c4cf8208968: I'm very busy, so you'll need to be quick! What do you need?
textByHash.9aeb376994864ebb1edcdb7160e4088b469df3f8: Too slow! We need to speed things up! Let's come together and fix this whetstone!
textByHash.a45a08e347fe7a1d5651975d621fe6fb837c0b20: I am one of the Dwarves of Cam Torum, human! Our metalwork and our magic are one. I am an expert in both.
textByHash.aa7272f4349c1269aa7c705db41ef1e3135be5e3: There you go, happy doing business with you!
textByHash.b88fd1e46a728950d19f1445d5b84d9ca7458912: Are you a Knight of Varlamore?
textByHash.cc11058723f69005a6439796a3792667f7ec5eec: I already told you to take them back to Attala. She'll tell you what to do with them.
textByHash.d7290db58495e376e0629544fa80da2e0a67d0e7: In a blacksmith? What do you think? Weapons!
textByHash.e6685090f5202f1fb3877931c479940b0f6607a7: Actually, here, have this one. It's broken, but you can use my newly fixed whetstone to sort that out.
textByHash.edd314fa92e7c30d41e1975cb467378f7fb8b044: Yes, the whetstone! Are you going to get it fixed or are you just going to keep standing around like that?
textByHash.f13da0b38006fdea2af9afcee67f022baec2406b: Humans! You're lucky I prepared for this!
